zh.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumont於大約1050年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易波奧蒙吉萊-農亞斯。她和Robert FitzPicot II至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1091年7月11日在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年42歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪奧內沙吉艾福盧吉諾特-達-度-波斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumont于大约1050年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯奧易波奧蒙吉萊-農亞斯。她和Robert FitzPicot II至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1091年7月11日在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年42岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪奧內沙吉艾福盧吉諾特-達-度-波斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumont was born about 1050, in Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Robert FitzPicot II. She died on 11 July 1091, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 42, and was buried in Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumont est née environ 1050, à Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Robert FitzPicot II. Elle est décédée le 11 juillet 1091, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumont wurde um 1050 in Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren. Sie hatte mit Robert FitzPicot II mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 11. Juli 1091 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumont è nata il circa 1050 nel Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Robert FitzPicot II. Morì il 11 luglio 1091, nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumontは約1050年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼビーウモント-レス-ノナインスで生まれた。彼女はRobert FitzPicot IIとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1091年7月11日にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで42歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンサイント-evロウルト-ノトレ-ダム-ドウ-ボイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumont(은)는 대략 1050년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 보몽-레스-넌언스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Robert FitzPicot II(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1091년 7월 11일 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 세인트-e브루트-노트레-다-드-보이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1050, em Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Robert FitzPicot II. Ela faleceu em 11 de julho de 1091, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumont родилась около 1050 г. в местности бомонт-лес-нонеинс, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Robert FitzPicot II. Она умерла 11 июля 1091 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-eвроулт-нотре-дэме-ду-боис, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1050, en Beaumont-les-Nonains, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Robert FitzPicot II. Murió el 11 de julio de 1091, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Évroult-Notre-Dame-du-Bois, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
